iti62:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti62:2.3:
The faculty of ‘I am about to know what is not yet finally known,’ the faculty of final knowledge,
the faculty of one who has finally known.
iti62:4.1: then, from the ending of the fetter–becoming–
iti62:4.2: there’s the knowledge, the gnosis of one released who is Such:
iti62:5.2: peaceful, delighting in the peaceful state,
iti62:5.4: having conquered Māra along with his mount.
